mission.title: grpc: Fix generating method output with nested resource
mission.description:
Fixes https://github.com/grpc/grpc/issues/21561

> The grpc_ruby_plugin protoc plugin has a bug in generating Ruby output for proto files with nested resources and using the ruby_package option.
> 
> The plugin works fine when using either nested resources or ruby_package, but not both.
> https://github.com/grpc/grpc/issues/21561

Fix to use `descriptor->full_name()` removed package name instead of `descriptor->name()` when using the `ruby_package` option.

@apolcyn

steps: In #22594, we fixed an issue with nested message. Example, let's say we have a proto message
However, this breaks the case if the message is in a _different_ proto package. Example, let's say we now have an imported proto file:
codeSnippets:
$ make grpc_ruby_plugin -j8
$ make $(pwd)/libs/opt/protobuf/libprotobuf.a -j8
$ cd src/ruby
$ CONFIG=opt rake
$ cd ../..
$ CONFIG=opt tools/run_tests/helper_scripts/run_ruby_end2end_tests.sh
